title: neonauclea hagenii subsp. papuana
intro: Neonauclea hagenii subsp. papuana is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neonauclea hagenii subsp. papuana include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, while also possessing antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Neonauclea hagenii subsp. papuana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, highlighting its potential as a valuable herbal remedy.
